summary: PR 2701 links the item translation unit src/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c by changing its build classification from NonMatching to Matching, correcting it_802C4D10's return type from void to u32 in both the C file and header, and updating symbols.txt metadata for several associated local string/float/double constants from global it_* names to local @ labels.

key_files.role: Build configuration changed itmewtwoshadowball.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk at MatchingFor changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c")

key_files.role: Item source signature for it_802C4D10 changed from void to u32.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmewtwoshadowball.c hunk changes void it_802C4D10(Item_GObj* gobj) to u32 it_802C4D10(Item_GObj* gobj)

key_files.role: Owning header prototype synchronized with recovered it_802C4D10 return type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itmewtwoshadowball.h hunk changes /* 2C4D10 */ void it_802C4D10(Item_GObj*) to /* 2C4D10 */ u32 it_802C4D10(Item_GObj*)

key_files.role: Symbol metadata updated for local string, float, and double constants around itmewtwoshadowball linkage.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_803F788C to @224 with scope:local data:string
raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804D5570 and it_804D5578 to @222 and @223 with scope:local data:string
raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DD258 through it_804DD288 from global it_* names to local @ labels for sdata2 float/double constants

what_changed.text: itmewtwoshadowball.c was promoted in configure.py from NonMatching to Matching.
Function it_802C4D10 now returns u32 instead of void in both implementation and header declaration.

Several symbols associated with strings and floating-point constants were converted from global it_* names to local @ labels while preserving addresses, sizes, sections, and data kinds shown in the diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt three hunks for .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 entries

smart_moves.text: The implementation and header were updated together for it_802C4D10, avoiding a recovered body/prototype mismatch.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: matching u32 signature change in itmewtwoshadowball.c and itmewtwoshadowball.h

smart_moves.text: The PR adjusted symbol metadata instead of adding C-side dummy storage or renamed externs for local constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt metadata-only conversions from it_* global names to local @ labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking a translation unit, verify that any recovered function return type is reflected in both the source definition and the owning header prototype.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802C4D10 changed from void to u32 in both itmewtwoshadowball.c and itmewtwoshadowball.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a code-link PR, symbol metadata may need to mark compiler-local strings and numeric constants as local @ labels rather than global it_* objects when the diff evidence identifies them as local data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_803F788C, it_804D5570, it_804D5578, and it_804DD258-it_804DD288 converted to local @ labels

naming_conventions.convention: Compiler-local constants in symbols.txt can use @NNN-style local labels with scope:local, while preserving section, address, size, alignment, and data kind metadata.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Linking the object required a narrow signature correction for it_802C4D10 and symbols.txt scope/name metadata cleanup for related constants before changing configure.py to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802C4D10 signature and prototype changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Synchronize recovered return types between source and owning header during link PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2701 changed it_802C4D10 from void to u32 in both src/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.c and src/melee/it/items/itmewtwoshadowball.h while linking the item TU.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer symbols.txt metadata fixes for local constants over C-side storage churn
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2701 linked itmewtwoshadowball while converting several string, float, and double symbols from global it_* objects to local @ labels in config/GALE01/symbols.txt, with no C-side dummy data additions shown.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all it_* symbols near itmewtwoshadowball should become local @ labels; the diff only supports the specific addresses changed.
Do not claim build, objdiff, or regression checks ran; none are present in the PR slice.
Do not infer reviewer rationale or requested changes; there were no loaded review or issue comments.
Do not generalize this PR into a global rule that string/float/double constants should always be local labels; data ownership remains section- and symbol-evidence dependent.
